description_long: This is a heavily armored, six-wheeled combat tactical vehicle with a low, angular profile and a digital camouflage paint scheme. The exterior is covered in thick, sloped armor plating, providing protection to the entire body, including the wheel wells and roof. The vehicle features two prominent weapon mounts: a machine gun on the front right roof and a larger turret on the rear left roof, both with visible protective shields. The wheels are large, robust, and appear to be reinforced for off-road and urban terrain, with a unique segmented design. There are no visible windows, suggesting advanced armor and possible use of cameras or sensors for navigation. The overall design emphasizes survivability, firepower, and mobility in urban combat scenarios.
description: A six-wheeled, heavily armored combat vehicle with digital camouflage, sloped armor, and two roof-mounted weapon systems. Its robust, angular design and reinforced wheels suggest high survivability and mobility.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, six wheels, digital camouflage, and both roof-mounted weapon systems.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the sloped armor, central machine gun mount, and the vehicle's wide, imposing stance.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the turret and machine gun mounts.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the armored back, rear turret, and the segmented wheel design.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Two visible weapon mounts: one machine gun mount on the front right roof and one larger turret on the rear left roof.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped, and angular armor plating, including reinforced wheel wells and roof; no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Digital camouflage pattern in shades of gray, black, and green with pixelated shapes.
attribute_tire_type: Six large, segmented, reinforced tires with an off-road tread pattern.
